x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer
x-enumeration-literals.description: The recipient or target of the incentive

x-enumeration-literals.name: Financial Institution
x-enumeration-literals.description: The party designing, funding, and managing the incentive

x-enumeration-literals.name: Third-Party Vendor
x-enumeration-literals.description: External entities involved in delivering or co-funding the incentive

x-enumeration-literals.name: Operator
x-enumeration-literals.description: The person or system responsible for executing, monitoring, and reporting the incentive.
